ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the monitoring station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person responsible for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., PM2.5, PM10, NO2, CO) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, malfunction) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can access staff-only features */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has superuser privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that shared the data */,
  "stakeholder" TEXT /* Stakeholder that received the data */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "sharing_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the data sharing is valid */,
  "sharing_conditions" TEXT /* Any conditions or restrictions on the data sharing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the rule applies to */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Data validation rule (e.g., range check, threshold check) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data validation rule */,
  "validation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the validation rule is applied */,
  "last_validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last validation check */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the last validation check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_backup" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data backup process */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the backup applies to */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Data backup schedule (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data backup process */,
  "last_backup_date" TEXT /* Date of the last backup */,
  "next_backup_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled backup */,
  "backup_location" TEXT /* Location where the backup is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_backup_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_recovery" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data recovery process */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the recovery applies to */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Data recovery procedure (e.g., restore from backup, re-collect data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data recovery procedure */,
  "last_recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data recovery */,
  "next_recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled data recovery */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the recovery process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_recovery_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data security measure */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the security measure applies to */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Data security protocol (e.g., encryption, access control) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data security protocol */,
  "last_security_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last security audit */,
  "next_security_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled security audit */,
  "security_breach_count" INTEGER /* Number of security breaches detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_security_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analysis tool */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the tool applies to */,
  "tool" TEXT /* Data analysis tool (e.g., statistical software, data visualization software) */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Data analysis technique (e.g., regression analysis, time series analysis) */,
  "last_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data analysis */,
  "next_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled data analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Current status of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data report */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the report applies to */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Data reporting schedule (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "template" TEXT /* Data reporting template (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "last_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data report */,
  "next_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled data report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Current status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reporting_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualization" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization tool */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the tool applies to */,
  "tool" TEXT /* Data visualization tool (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Data visualization technique (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "last_visualization_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data visualization */,
  "next_visualization_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled data visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Current status of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualization_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
